/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/TCSpMVlib_perf.dir/test/test_spmv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TCSpMVlib_perf.dir/utilities/csr2csc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TCSpMVlib_perf.dir/utilities/mmio.cpp.o -o TCSpMVlib_perf  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib libTCSpMVlib.a /usr/local/cuda-12.5/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcusparse.so
